title: armeria maritima subsp. odorata
intro: Armeria maritima subsp. odorata, also known as the fragrant thrift or sea pink, is a flowering plant species that belongs to the primrose family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and combat infections. The plant's health benefits include its ability to lower blood pressure, reduce stress, and improve respiratory health, making it a popular herbal remedy for various ailments. Armeria maritima subsp. odorata can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal properties and health benefits.
